title: Gas Service Payment Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Utility Assistance > Gas Service Payment Assistance * Hispanic/Latino Community 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Hispanic/Latino Community Older Adults Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO ENERGY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides electric, gas, and heating fuel payment assistance. May be able to assist with utilities that have been disconnected or shut off for non-payment. Unable to assist with an account that has been closed. Assistance is not guaranteed. 333 SE 223rd Avenue Suite 100 Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Pacific Power customers Hours: Not accepting appointments Email (503) 669-8350 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LATINO NETWORK ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with electric bills, natural gas bills, and heating fuel. 410 NE 18th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: 60% of State Median Income for household size (including gross income for all members of household ages 18 and older). Certain kinds of energy assistance may have additional requirements, including age restrictions and the need for a Social Security number. Hours: Not accepting appointments Email (503) 208-2174 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EL PROGRAMA HISPANO CATÓLICO ENERGY ASSISTANCE LATINO NETWORK ENERGY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM
